name: chat_completion
description: Generate conversational AI responses using any supported open-source language model through an OpenAI-compatible chat completions interface. Supports automatic provider selection, streaming, tool calling, and model routing policies.

parameters.name: model
parameters.description: Model ID in 'org/model' format. Append ':fastest', ':cheapest', or ':preferred' for provider selection policy.

parameters.name: messages
parameters.description: Array of message objects with 'role' (system/user/assistant) and 'content'.

parameters.name: max_tokens
parameters.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate in the response.

parameters.name: temperature
parameters.description: Sampling temperature between 0 and 2. Higher values increase randomness.

parameters.name: stream
parameters.description: Whether to stream the response as server-sent events.

parameters.name: tools
parameters.description: Array of tool definitions for function calling.

message.content: Machine learning is a subset of artificial intelligence that enables systems to learn and improve from experience without being explicitly programmed.
